overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort QQQ (QID) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index. The fund provides 2x inverse exposure to a modified market-cap-weighted index of 100 large non-financial firms listed on NASDAQ. QID was launched on Jul 11, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: A Nasdaq Comeback
data.text: After a long wait, tech stock investors have plenty to cheer about. It took a whopping 167 days, but the Nasdaq-100 index last week surpassed its previous closing high from back in October 2025 while ...
